title:
Lesson 1:
See You / See You There
description: 'Nos vemos' = See you (literally: we see each other). Add a location to say where you'll meet: 'Nos vemos en la casa' = See you at home, 'Nos vemos en la esquina' = See you at the corner.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: I have to go. See you.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: What time do you get home?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: A las seis. Nos vemos en la casa.
dialogue.english: At six. See you at home.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.spanish: Yo llego antes. ¿Nos vemos en la esquina mejor?
dialogue.english: I arrive earlier. Should we meet at the corner instead?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: Perfecto. Nos vemos en la esquina a las seis.
dialogue.english: Perfect. See you at the corner at six.

title:
Lesson 2:
Until Tomorrow / Take Care
description: 'Nos vemos en la parada' = See you at the bus stop. 'Nos vemos en la estación' = See you at the station. 'Hasta mañana' = Until tomorrow / See you tomorrow. 'Que te vaya bien' = Take care / I hope things go well for you.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Are you taking the subway today?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.spanish: Sí. Nos vemos en la estación a las ocho.
dialogue.english: Yes. See you at the station at eight.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: Mejor nos vemos en la parada del autobús. Está más cerca.
dialogue.english: Better we meet at the bus stop. It's closer.

vocabulary.english: see you at the bus stop
take care / hope things go well

title:
Lesson 3:
Bon Appétit
description: 'Buen provecho' = Bon appétit / Enjoy your meal. Used before or during a meal, or when you see someone eating. A polite response is '¡Gracias!' or 'Igualmente' (same to you).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: La comida está lista. ¡Buen provecho a todos!
dialogue.english: The food is ready. Enjoy your meal, everyone!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: We're eating. Enjoy — would you like some?
